title: The Tenant of Wildfell Hall
descr: The Tenant of Wildfell Hall is the second and final novel by English author Anne Brontë. It was first published in 1848 under the pseudonym Acton Bell.

title: The Murders in the Rue Morgue
descr: The Murders in the Rue Morgue is a short story by Edgar Allan Poe published in 1841. It is considered one of the first detective stories.

title: The Professor
descr: The Professor, A Tale is the first novel by Charlotte Brontë. It was written before Jane Eyre, but was rejected by many publishing houses.

title: The Masque of the Red Death
descr: The Masque of the Red Death is a short story by American writer Edgar Allan Poe, first published in 1842.

title: Poems by Currer, Ellis, and Acton Bell
descr: A collection of poetry published by the three Brontë sisters in 1846 under their pseudonyms.
